title: HAUTMEC 150mm Pro Mini Hacksaw, Compact Hack Saw with Aluminium Alloy Frame, Hand Saw with 6 Adjustable Cutting Angles & 24TPI Bi-Metal Blade for Wood, Metal, PVC & DIY – HT0145
features: 【Strong & Durable Frame】Crafted from a one-piece high-strength aluminium alloy frame, this mini hacksaw delivers stability and long-lasting durability for precise cutting
【6 Adjustable Blade Angles】Blade can be set at six different positions, enabling flush cuts, angle cuts, and sawing in confined or awkward spaces. Tool-free blade changes for convenience
【High-Performance 24TPI Blade】Supplied with a bi-metal blade featuring HSS wavy teeth, engineered for smooth, efficient cutting on wood, PVC, rubber, steel pipes, and light metal
【Comfortable Non-Slip Grip】Ergonomically designed soft rubber handle provides a secure, comfortable hold. Anti-slip and wear-resistant coating reduces fatigue during prolonged use

【Compact & Versatile】Measuring 150mm (6”), this portable mini hacksaw is ideal for DIYers, plumbers, electricians, and professionals. Perfect for home repairs, construction, decoration, and craft projects
description: Product Description HAUTMEC 6 Inch Adjustable One-Piece Hacksaw Frame Durable, solid and rust resistance Convenient for professional work indoor or outdoor. Our hacksaw can be installed at 6 angles and allows flush cuts. It has a handle for comfort and a convenient bolt for quick and easy blade replacement. Less hand fatigue Greatly labor-saving and improving user's work efficiency. Come with 1 pcs 150mm high quality blade Frame Material: high quality aluminum alloy Length and width: length 270mm, width 90mm Saw blade length: 150mm 6-Angle Cutting The hacksaw blade can be installed at 6 angles to meet the needs of actual situations, ensuring different angles of cutting and making sawing easier and more convenient. Durable Blade Come with a high-tension durable blade for reliable and quick sawing. Comfortable Handle With soft coating, the ergonomic grip and cushioned head are non-slip for security and wear-resistant, giving a comfortable control, greatly saving your strength and improving your efficiency. Compact and Practical This mini hack saw features compact but solid construction, providing reliable work and easy storage. Tool-free blade change
